posts.author: Susana (Susana)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We would like to be able to send an custom email in Monday Sales CRM with an attachment, lets say a quotation that is in a File column. This does not work neither as a massive email nor an automated email. It sends a link that only opens if you have a monday.com account and access to that board.
Hope you can work around that since it would be super useful for us.
It will be great as well on Monday Work Management platform!

Kind regards,
Susana
